an2.32:1.1:
1
"Asappurisabhūmiñca vo, bhikkhave, desessāmi sappurisabhūmiñca. Taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasi karotha. Bhāsissāmī"ti.
an2.32:1.2: "Evaṁ, bhante"ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. Bhagavā etadavoca:
an2.32:1.3:
2
"Katamā ca, bhikkhave, asappurisabhūmi? Asappuriso, bhikkhave, akataññū hoti akatavedī. Asabbhi hetaṁ, bhikkhave, upaññātaṁ yadidaṁ akataññutā akataveditā. Kevalā esā, bhikkhave, asappurisabhūmi yadidaṁ akataññutā akataveditā.
an2.32:1.4: Sappuriso ca kho, bhikkhave, kataññū hoti katavedī. Sabbhi hetaṁ, bhikkhave, upaññātaṁ yadidaṁ kataññutā kataveditā. Kevalā esā, bhikkhave, sappurisabhūmi yadidaṁ kataññutā kataveditā"ti.
